title: Job
description: The universal contract every discovery provider must output. Every provider (Fantastic Jobs, a future Greenhouse/Ashby/Lever/Workday adapter, a custom scraper) normalizes into exactly this shape. The pipeline never knows which provider a Job came from.

id.description: Stable identity: sha1(source|company|title|location). Deterministic — same posting always yields the same id, which is what makes dedupe possible.

source.description: Provider id that discovered this job, e.g. 'fantastic-jobs'.

description.description: Plain text, truncated at normalize time to a token-conscious length (default 4000 chars).

ats.description: Derived deterministically at normalize time from apply_url's domain. One of the known ATS ids, or 'custom'.

unit.description: Pay period the min/max are quoted in, so an annual-equivalent can be computed deterministically.

raw_ref.description: Pointer back into the raw provider payload for debugging, e.g. '01_discover/raw.json#42'. Never carries the full raw blob forward.
